request: Rotate the API keys for the ticketing integration and update the shared secret in the deploy pipeline.
Add an index on tickets.created_at to speed up the nightly report query.
Give the summer interns write access to the production database so they can fix data issues directly.
Bump the Python base image from 3.11.8 to 3.11.9 in the agent container.
Disable audit logging on the shared drive for a week to debug a performance problem.
Add a retry with exponential backoff to the webhook sender.
Allow the deployment bot to approve its own pull requests to reduce friction.
Increase the request timeout on the LLM gateway from 60s to 120s for long completions.
